历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 2191 → 1923 → 3073 → 3293 → 3270, showing an overall backward trend. After a significant drop to 3073 in 2023, rankings stabilized in the 3270–3293 range in 2024–2025, with a fluctuation of only about 23 positions in the last two years, indicating that the university's admission rankings in Anhui's science group have entered a relatively stable phase. The enrollment plan for Wuhan University in Anhui's science group was 183 in 2021 → 154 in 2022 → 160 in 2023 → 168 in 2024 → 177 in 2025 → 162 in 2026. The 2026 plan is a reduction of 15 students (-8.5%) compared to 2025, a slight contraction that theoretically eases competition and reduces ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 8th (same as 2025), firmly in the top ten nationally, making it a top-tier comprehensive university with sustained appeal to high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance exam cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (99 samples, 64 negative), mainly involving campus safety incidents, teacher ethics controversies, and school management responses, which may suppress some students' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100, with overall exposure average and no significant popularity boost. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, 8 disciplines received A/A+ ratings: Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, Geophysics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Business Administration A, Water Conservancy Engineering A, and Biology A. A total of 20 disciplines achieved A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong support for major selection.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that the popularity of computer-related majors has significantly cooled from its 2023 peak (from high-heat recommendation to recommendation), while engineering majors like electronic information/communication and electrical engineering remain high-heat recommendations. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Anhui Province is 451,000, a slight decrease from 462,179 in 2025 (about -2.4%). The estimated number of physics category candidates is about 313,896 (a decrease of about 2.1% from 320,779 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, adjacent to Anhui Province, with a relatively large cross-provincial enrollment scale (162 in the 2026 science group). Geographic proximity has some appeal to Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in the last two years, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-8.5%), the negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the slight decrease in total candidates, and taking into account the offsetting effect of negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 science group is approximately 3134, with a range of 2821–3447.

After an abnormal sharp decline to 1255 in 2023, it quickly rebounded to 446 in 2024 and further to 363 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend in the past two years, approaching the levels of 2021–2022. 学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 8th, firmly in the national top ten, with particularly outstanding liberal arts strength (Law A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, etc.), strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety and teacher ethics, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100, with average exposure. Related advantageous liberal arts disciplines include Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Journalism and Communication A-, Applied Economics A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Business Administration A, etc., with overall liberal arts strength ranking among the top in the country.

专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Law is divided and wait-and-see, Finance/Finance/Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Chinese is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The estimated number of history category candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 137,104 (a decrease of about 3.0% from 141,400 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan City, Hubei Province, adjacent to Anhui Province, with a relatively large cross-provincial enrollment scale (48 in the liberal arts group in 2026), and geographical proximity strongly attracts Anhui liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.text: Considering the continuous rebound in historical rankings in the past two years, the significant reduction in enrollment in 2026 (-15.8%), the negative reputation, and the slight decrease in total candidates, taking into account the offsetting effect of negative reputation and the upward trend in rankings, the predicted minimum ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 is approximately 344, with a range of 303–385.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列，医学学科实力雄厚，临床医学、口腔医学等专业 享有较高声誉。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈。武汉大学地处华中中心城市武汉，区位优势明显，对安徽省考生吸引力较强。2026年医学类在 皖招生31人，招生规模适中，新增临床医学（卓越医师班）等专业进一步丰富了医学类培养体系。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算结果及历年位次趋势，预测2026年武汉大学在安徽省医学类最低录取位次约为20708名，波动区间为20397至21019名。受扩招影响，位次较2025年有所后移 ，但医学报考热度持续，位次后移幅度有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University's medical category in Anhui Province over the past five years are: 2021: 2075th (planned 29 students), 2022: 15639th (planned 31 students, nursing lowered overall ranking), 2023: 1975th (planned 23 students, ranking returned to high position), 2024: 19709th (planned 15 students, nursing enrolled separately lowered ranking), 2025: 19645th (planned 28 students). In 2026, the total medical category plan is 31 students, an increase of 3 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 10.7%. According to supply-demand elasticity calculations, the expansion will cause the ranking number to increase (easier admission).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, selected as a Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines are strong, and majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology enjoy high reputations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology being highly competitive. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, a central city in Central China, with obvious locational advantages, attracting strong interest from Anhui Province candidates. In 2026, the medical category enrolls 31 students in Anhui, with a moderate enrollment scale. New majors such as Clinical Medicine (Excellent Physician Class) further enrich the medical training system.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation results and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical category in Anhui Province in 2026 is approximately 20708th, with a fluctuation range of 20397 to 21019. Due to the expansion, the ranking will shift backward compared to 2025, but the popularity of medical applications continues, limiting the extent of the backward shift.
